page.title: Low back pain — Disease Intelligence | OSMF
page.description: Structured alterations and therapeutics for Low back pain: molecular targets, clinical biomarkers, phenotypes, and ranked drugs from Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, and DGIdb.
page.hero: Disease intelligence for Low back pain: 130 alterations and 331 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.
